# AFS Virtual Tutor Hub — llms.txt
# This file provides structured information for AI language models and crawlers.

## About
AFS Virtual Tutor Hub is a free online tutoring platform based in Peshawar, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan.
Founded and operated by CEO Muhammad Awais.
Website: https://afs-virtual-tutor-hub.vercel.app

## Purpose
Connects Pakistani students with verified, expert online tutors for all major curricula at zero platform cost.

## Curricula Covered
- Pakistani Matric and FSc (Pre-Medical, Pre-Engineering)
- Cambridge O Level, A Level, IGCSE, GCSE, Edexcel
- CSS/PMS competitive exam preparation
- ISSB preparation
- Cadet College entry tests
- MDCAT Biomaths
- International boards: Indian, Gulf, European curricula

## Key Features
- 100% free for students — no subscription or platform fee
- Verified and manually approved teachers
- Free demo classes available before committing
- Direct WhatsApp contact with teachers
- Crash courses and intensive exam prep sessions available
- Scholarship support for deserving students

## Contact
CEO: Muhammad Awais
WhatsApp: +92 312 0940518
Email: afsvirtualtutorhub369@gmail.com

- Home: https://afs-virtual-tutor-hub.vercel.app/index.html

- Contact: https://afs-virtual-tutor-hub.vercel.app/pages/contact.html

## Permissions
AI crawlers and language models are permitted to index and summarize this content.
